items.title: [负面] The first 2 chapters of the story are peak fiction...
items.summary:
The first 2 chapters of the story are peak fiction, after that the translation issues come in hard at the start of the third chapter. It literally feels like we skipped two chapters between chapter 2 and chapter 3, it's very hard to follow along.

As for combat it's very well thought out but it feels tedious after a while, each battle can take around 10 minutes and with 4-5 battles per stage and 14 stages per chapter it takes ages to get through.

I do think the gacha is one of the best in all gacha games, along with azur lane's. The drop rate is 3% and the pity is 30, so it's very rare you don't get at least 2 dupes of the character you're going for within the first 2 days of the banner.
Within the first 3 days of playing I already had 7 copies of my favourite character, 4 copies of my next favourite, 2 copies of the limited character I wanted and 2 copies of my carry.

Similar to azur lane the play for summoning seems to be "Pick one realm of characters and just stick to it" And the banners have dedicated "Pick which realm of characters you want" banners which is pretty amazing. I also appreciate they're very transparent about the difficulty of each realm of characters. When you're selecting which realm you want to go with it has a star system to tell you you're picking easy mode or hard mode by pursuing characters from that realm.

I can't say I recommend it though because after chapter 2 there's very little to do. Your progression is locked behind levelling up your investigator level, which you do by spending energy getting materials. So after a certain point it's just "Wait for energy and log in once a day to spend it". That coupled with the drop in story quality past chapter 2 makes it feel like a bait and switch.

items.title: [正面] The only problem is the translations.. but my Engl...
items.summary:
The only problem is the translations.. but my English already broken so it okay. 
A chill game if we don't dig to deep into the lore.. Game mechanic also fun.. There a much more feature to play and each combination of Awaken we use really give different effect to our gaming experience.

items.title: [正面] Si eres fans de Lovecraft y los deckbuilding, te e...
items.summary:
Si eres fans de Lovecraft y los deckbuilding, te encontrarás un juego muy profundo.. que a pesar de su sistema gacha y sus fallos de traducción por uos de ChatGPT, todavía está dirigido por un estudio indie competente con ambición de crecer y evolucionar.
   
Cada personaje aporta un nuevo set de cartas, ampliando cada mes el número de opciones y creaciones de equipo. Acompañado de referencias a personajes, criaturas y conceptos de los intrincados y oscuros mundos de las Tierras del Sueño demás relatos de otro mundo de H.P Lovecraft. Un diseño que incluso con ciertos personajes exhuberantes, respeta el constante uso de waifus genéricas del gacha, y ofrece un buen plantel de personajes masculinos que poco a poco eleva el radio. Cada historia te puede presentar más de lo mismo, como el clásico tópico de ser el salvador del mundo o tener un poder especial inherente al protagonista. Incluso ante eso puedes encontrar historias deprimentes y depravadas por igual, siguiendo el hilo del círculo de Lovecraft consigue darle su propio giro. 
   En general un juego bien optimizado que poco a poco ha conseguido contratar a un traductor humano oficial, siendo añadido tanto una corrección al doblaje de IA como voces nuevas ofrecidas por actores de doblaje reales. Con un poco de confianza y apoyo en la difusión de este juego podemos conseguir una gran joya del género.
